db:select.doc:name: Get Historical Usage
db:select.db:sql: SELECT u.usage_date, u.kwh_used, u.cost, u.peak_demand, u.temperature, u.day_of_week, u.month, u.season, c.home_type, c.home_size_sqft, c.occupancy_count FROM usage_data u JOIN customers c ON u.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE u.customer_id = :customerId AND u.usage_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 365 ORDER BY u.usage_date

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Analytics service unavailable", "message": "Unable to generate predictions at this time" }

db:select.doc:name: Get Usage Patterns
db:select.db:sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.home_type, c.home_size_sqft, c.occupancy_count, AVG(u.kwh_used) as avg_daily_usage, AVG(u.cost) as avg_daily_cost, MAX(u.peak_demand) as max_peak_demand, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM u.timestamp) BETWEEN 16 AND 20 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) as peak_hour_ratio, AVG(CASE WHEN wu.temperature > 85 THEN u.kwh_used END) as hot_weather_usage, AVG(CASE WHEN wu.temperature < 45 THEN u.kwh_used END) as cold_weather_usage FROM customers c JOIN usage_data u ON c.customer_id = u.customer_id LEFT JOIN weather_data wu ON DATE(u.usage_date) = wu.date WHERE c.customer_id = :customerId AND u.usage_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 90 GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.home_type, c.home_size_sqft, c.occupancy_count

db:select.doc:name: Get Benchmarks
db:select.db:sql: SELECT AVG(u.kwh_used) as similar_homes_avg, AVG(u.cost) as similar_homes_cost_avg, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY u.kwh_used) as efficient_quartile_usage, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY u.kwh_used) as inefficient_quartile_usage FROM usage_data u JOIN customers c ON u.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.home_type = :homeType AND c.home_size_sqft BETWEEN :sizeLower AND :sizeUpper AND u.usage_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 90

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json import * from dw::core::Arrays
fun calculateSavings(current, efficient, costPerKwh) = (current - efficient) * costPerKwh * 30
fun generateTimeOfUseRecommendation(peakRatio, avgUsage, costPerKwh) = if (peakRatio > 0.3) { type: "time-of-use", title: "Shift Usage to Off-Peak Hours", description: "You use " ++ (peakRatio * 100) as String ++ "% of your energy during peak hours. Consider running dishwashers, laundry, and charging electric vehicles during off-peak hours (9 PM - 6 AM) to save on energy costs.", potentialSavings: (avgUsage * peakRatio * 0.15 * costPerKwh * 30) as Number, actionRequired: "Adjust appliance usage schedule", priority: if (peakRatio > 0.5) "high" else "medium" } else null
fun generateHVACRecommendation(customerUsage, weatherUsage, benchmarkUsage, costPerKwh) = if (weatherUsage > benchmarkUsage * 1.3) { type: "hvac-optimization", title: "Optimize Heating & Cooling", description: "Your HVAC system uses " ++ ((weatherUsage / benchmarkUsage - 1) * 100) as String ++ "% more energy than similar homes. Consider programmable thermostats, improved insulation, or HVAC maintenance.", potentialSavings: calculateSavings(weatherUsage, benchmarkUsage, costPerKwh), actionRequired: "Schedule HVAC assessment and upgrade insulation", priority: if (weatherUsage > benchmarkUsage * 1.5) "high" else "medium" } else null
fun generateEfficiencyRecommendation(customerUsage, efficientUsage, costPerKwh) = if (customerUsage > efficientUsage * 1.2) { type: "appliance-efficiency", title: "Upgrade to Energy-Efficient Appliances", description: "Your overall energy usage is " ++ ((customerUsage / efficientUsage - 1) * 100) as String ++ "% higher than the most efficient homes in your area. Consider upgrading to ENERGY STAR appliances.", potentialSavings: calculateSavings(customerUsage, efficientUsage, costPerKwh), actionRequired: "Research and replace inefficient appliances", priority: if (customerUsage > efficientUsage * 1.5) "high" else "low" } else null
fun generateSolarRecommendation(homeType, avgMonthlyBill, homeSize) = if (avgMonthlyBill > 120 and homeSize > 1500 and homeType != "apartment") { type: "solar-installation", title: "Consider Solar Panel Installation", description: "Based on your energy usage patterns and home characteristics, solar panels could significantly reduce your electricity bills. You could potentially save " ++ (avgMonthlyBill * 0.7) as String ++ " per month.", potentialSavings: avgMonthlyBill * 0.7 * 12, actionRequired: "Get solar assessment and quotes", priority: "medium" } else null
fun generateSmartHomeRecommendation(peakUsage, avgUsage) = if (peakUsage > avgUsage * 2) { type: "smart-home", title: "Install Smart Home Energy Management", description: "Your peak demand is significantly higher than your average usage. Smart home devices can automatically manage appliances and reduce peak demand charges.", potentialSavings: peakUsage * 0.2 * 15 * 12, // Assuming peak demand charges actionRequired: "Install smart thermostats, smart water heater controller, and load management system", priority: "medium" } else null
--- { customerId: attributes.uriParams.customerId, recommendations: [ generateTimeOfUseRecommendation( vars.customerPattern.peak_hour_ratio, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_cost / vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage ), generateHVACRecommendation( vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage, (vars.customerPattern.hot_weather_usage + vars.customerPattern.cold_weather_usage) / 2, vars.benchmarks.similar_homes_avg, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_cost / vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage ), generateEfficiencyRecommendation( vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage, vars.benchmarks.efficient_quartile_usage, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_cost / vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage ), generateSolarRecommendation( vars.customerPattern.home_type, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_cost * 30, vars.customerPattern.home_size_sqft ), generateSmartHomeRecommendation( vars.customerPattern.max_peak_demand, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage ) ] filter ($ != null),
insights: { efficiencyRanking: if (vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage <= vars.benchmarks.efficient_quartile_usage) "top_25_percent" else if (vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage <= vars.benchmarks.similar_homes_avg) "above_average" else if (vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage <= vars.benchmarks.inefficient_quartile_usage) "below_average" else "bottom_25_percent", totalPotentialSavings: sum([ generateTimeOfUseRecommendation(vars.customerPattern.peak_hour_ratio, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_cost / vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage).potentialSavings, generateHVACRecommendation(vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage, (vars.customerPattern.hot_weather_usage + vars.customerPattern.cold_weather_usage) / 2, vars.benchmarks.similar_homes_avg, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_cost / vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage).potentialSavings, generateEfficiencyRecommendation(vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage, vars.benchmarks.efficient_quartile_usage, vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_cost / vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage).potentialSavings ] filter ($ != null)), carbonFootprintReduction: (vars.customerPattern.avg_daily_usage - vars.benchmarks.efficient_quartile_usage) * 365 * 0.0004 // kg CO2 per kWh } }

logger.message: Getting energy tips for customer: #[vars.customerId], season: #[vars.season]
